projects.title: Character Creator
projects.description: A fun tool to create the personality of your next tabletop character. You can choose or randomize four aspects of your personality: trait, bond, flaw and ideal. Also, if you need more inspiration, you can generate a small background to give life to your character.

projects.title: Notes App
projects.description: Notes App is a platform for scheduling and managing tabletop gaming sessions. You can create users, events, manage locations, and coordinate with other players.

projects.title: Mini paint
projects.description: This is a fun little project made with Typescript vanilla, styled with CSS. It contains a canvas where you can... well, paint! You can also save your drawing if you like it.

projects.title: Pokédex
projects.description: The classic Pokédex! I code it to apply for my first hackaton. You can search, filter, fav and navigate the first 50 pokémon. It also has a very comprehensive set of tests. Data is fetch from the Pokéapi.

projects.title: BarriSense
projects.description: This was my first project for a Hackaton. It was a great learning experience and I had a great multidisciplinary and invested team. Together we created BarriSense, a participatory website where citizens can submit complaints about their neighborhood and see them represented in a heat map that shows the level of social unrest in Barcelona. Backend is made with Java + Sprintboot

projects.title: Find Games
projects.description: Find Games is a platform for scheduling and managing tabletop gaming sessions. You can create users, events, manage locations, and coordinate with other players.

projects.title: Quote Tracker
projects.description: This is my quote estimation tool, built with React and Vite, and featuring a services selection, real-time price calculation, and client information management. The app includes URL parameters for sharing the quotes and different pages, built with React Router. It also has filters and a clean, responsive design. Hope you like it.
